name: Through the Badlands
description: This model gains the following ability:

granted_abilities.name: Demise (The Hunt Begins)
granted_abilities.text: After this model is killed, the opposing player may summon a The Bad Omen model with 4 health into base contact with this model.

granted_actions.name: Arrhythmia
granted_actions.costs_and_restrictions: This trigger must be declared, if able.
granted_actions.effects: Immediately, this action fails. This model must discard a card, drain a (soulstone), or be killed.

triggers.name: Arrhythmia
triggers.text: This trigger must be declared, if able. Immediately, this action fails. This model must discard a card, drain a (soulstone), or be killed.

extraction_notes: The Arrhythmia ability is noted as gaining the trigger 'on all its attack actions', which means this is a trigger that applies to any attack action the model makes, not a standalone action itself. However, the formatting presents it as a triggered ability that modifies attack actions.

The trigger appears to be mandatory ('must be declared, if able'), but the trigger format itself doesn't follow standard Malifaux formatting. Treating as a special trigger that applies to all attack actions.
The card shows 'This model gains the following trigger on all its attack actions:' which indicates this is a universal trigger modifier, not a specific action granted by the upgrade.
